utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates: 'May 15-19, 2024 (5 days)' — fully specified.
3. transportation: includes flight route (Paris CDG to Prague), airline type, cost, passengers, and class — fully specified.
4. accommodation: includes hotel details, star rating, included breakfast, guest rating, total cost, and duration — fully specified.
5. activities: includes type of activities and total cost — fully specified.
6. additional_services: includes dining experience, cuisine type, allergy accommodation, reservation note, and cost — fully specified.
7. total_budget: includes total cost breakdown, remaining budget, payment and booking status — fully specified.
All 7 items are covered and fully detailed according to the format.
